name: PER_CHK_CONTENT_DEFNS_B
description: PER_CHK_CONTENT_DEFNS_B : This is base table for checklist content definition

columns.Name: CHK_CONTENT_DEFN_ID
columns.Comments: CHK_CONTENT_DEFN_ID

columns.Name: CONTENT_DEFN_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique code for seed data purpose

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments:
Content Type
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_CONTENT_TYPE
Values:
ORA_NOTE - Note
ORA_EVENT - Events / Announcements
ORA_ONBOARDING_STEP - Onboarding Step

columns.Name: CONTENT_SUBTYPE
columns.Comments:
Content Sub Type
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_CONTENT_SUBTYPE
Values: ORA_NOTE_DEFAULT - Default ( Title, Descripton )
ORA_NOTE_RICH_CONTENT - Rich Content ( Title, Content Details)
ORA_NOTE_EMBED_CONTENT - Embedded HTML Content (Title, HTML Content)
ORA_NOTE_MEETING - Meeting (Title, Event Date, Event Time, Event Location)
ORA_EVENT_DEFAULT - Default ( Image URL, Content Category, Title, Content URL, Event Date)
ORA_ONBOARDING_STAGES - Onboarding Stages (Title, Description)
ORA_ONBOARDING_TASK_HELP - Onboarding Task Help (Title, Description)
ORA_ONBOARDING_LINK_LIST - Onboarding List of Links (Title, Description, Content Items)
ORA_ONBOARDING_NOTE_LIST - Onboarding List of Notes (Title, Description, Content Items)
ORA_ONBOARDING_RICH_CONTENT - Rich Content ( Title, Description, Content Details)
ORA_ONBOARDING_EMBED_CONTENT - HTML Content ( Title, Description, HTML Content)

columns.Name: CONTENT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments:
Content Category
Extensible Lookup: ORA_CHK_CONTENT_CATEGORY
Values - ORA_ANNOUNCEMENT - Announcement
ORA_EVENT - Event
ORA_INSIGHT - Insight

columns.Name: CONTENT_URL
columns.Comments: CONTENT_URL

columns.Name: IMAGE_URL
columns.Comments: Image URL

columns.Name: HTML_CONTENT
columns.Comments: HTML Markup content

columns.Name: EVENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Event Date

columns.Name: EVENT_TIME
columns.Comments: Event Time

columns.Name: EVENT_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Event Location

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments:
Content Status
System Lookup: ACTIVE_INACTIVE
Value: ACTIVE - Active
INACTIVE - Inactive

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: EMBEDDED_CONTENT
columns.Comments: Contains the embedded content

columns.Name: EVENT_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Contains the event offset.

columns.Name: EMBEDDED_CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines the content type of embedded content.
